params.name: Remains of Sipán Lord
params.description:
On Jan 5, 1987 AD, Dr. Alva discovered the tomb of the Lord of Sipán, near Chiclayo in northern Peru.
The Moche civilization is one of the civilizations in Mesoamerica, about a thousand years earlier than the Inca civilization. Because of its remote location, it has not been extensively destroyed. When Dr. Appell found the tomb, he was shocked by the rich burial objects. In order to prevent it from being looted by the villagers, he stayed in the tomb despite the death threats from the village …
